narrative:
Athens South (precinct in Athens County) has 1,211 registered voters, with 47.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 39.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 25.4 percentage points.
